profil.sous_titre: Data Team Lead · Management Committee · Dakar, Senegal
profil.positioning: I digitalize and optimize B2B distribution networks in West Africa through Data and AI.
profil.bio:
Data Team Lead and Supply Chain Analyst at MAAD Distribution, I have been driving the digital transformation of B2B distribution in Senegal for nearly 4 years — from supplier orders to field performance analysis across 18500+ stores.

As part of the management committee, I work in coordination with the Operations and Finance Director on key process implementation (purchasing, receiving, returns management, customer claims, damaged products) and provide expertise on warehouse, delivery, and fleet optimization.

A recipient of the Togolese State Scholarship in Senegal (2016–2021), holding a Master's in SC Engineering (Université d'Artois, 16.2/20) and the MIT SCM MicroMasters (93/100), I am currently pursuing a dual Master's DSIA / MS2D (ESMT + 3iL) in Data Science and AI.

description: Data team management (2 people on the Tech side) — business orientation, system knowledge, guided autonomy
Management committee member: participation in strategic and operational decisions in coordination with the Ops & Finance Director
Advisory role on operations optimization (warehouses, deliveries, fleet)
Cross-functional involvement: strategic management and operational support for field teams
Operational process design: supplier order → receiving → stock put-away, delivery returns collection, customer claims, damaged products, cycle count
KPI setup across all departments (Purchasing, Warehouse, Customer Service)
Data extraction, analysis, and visualization on key performance indicators
Purchase tracking via dedicated tracking files
Supervision of 3 junior buyers: training, coaching, overall performance monitoring
Maintained 70% availability rate on a ~800 SKU product catalog
Supplier relationship management: selection, evaluation, catalog, account reconciliation
Working capital (BFR) optimization, supplier credit negotiation
Procurement, logistics coordination, upstream transport organization (EXW purchases)
Internal transfers, receipt verification, damaged products and supplier returns management
Supplier payment tracking

experience.entreprise: Compagnie Africaine de Commerce — CAC Senegal
description: Management of cacsenegal.com and Jumia Senegal partnership
Online order processing, weekly performance monitoring
Cyclic and periodic inventory counts, fraud detection
Tender submission file preparation
Management of a 15-vendor portfolio (Home Appliances) on Africa's leading e-commerce marketplace
KPI analysis: conversion rate, revenue, pageviews, items sold
Annual Joint Business Plan development and monitoring for strategic accounts
Replenishment, consignment stock management, product returns management
Employee of the Month (2020)

formation.ecole: Université d'Artois × Centre Trainmar de Dakar

formation.diplome: Master's in Data Science & AI (DSIA) + MS2D

certifications.nom: CTSC — Certified in Transformation for Supply Chain
EDBA — Executive Doctorate in Business Administration

projets.description: Deployment and management of the digital distribution platform for 18500+ neighborhood stores in Senegal. End-to-end operational workflow design, multi-campaign KPI dashboards, GPS mapping of ~130 Senegalese markets, daily report automation.
Multi-campaign dashboards: KPI tracking, submission modification analysis, automated daily reports via Google Apps Script + Heroku Dataclips.
Returns Warehouse workflow: flows to Pikine Hangar and STOCK QUARANTINE, multi-step validations, field agent mobile API.
Wholesaler mapping interface with cascading geographic filters and performance metrics. ~130 markets geocoded with field GPS data.
Academic project (Université d'Artois × CTD): logistics network design based on the SCOR model. Group leader.

distinctions.description: Scholarship to study in Senegal · 5 years
US Embassy · TETO · Team leader (3 members)
